title: ceropegia pachystelma subsp. undulata
intro: Ceropegia pachystelma subsp. undulata, also known as the twisted ceropegia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ceropegia pachystelma subsp. undulata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or oil, and are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
